$comment: Static MCP tool definitions for this repo's deterministic slot-math capabilities. Phase B: the local stdio MCP server (see docs/adr/0020-local-stdio-mcp-server.md) reads these definitions at startup so the live server and the published tool-defs can never drift. Each tool maps 1:1 to an export in src/slotmath.js; the schemas mirror those functions' real signatures and return shapes.

tools.name: verify_rtp
tools.title: Verify RTP (exact)
tools.description: Compute exact theoretical RTP, house edge, per-line hit frequency, standard deviation, and jackpot odds by full payline enumeration. Deterministic; no RNG, no network. Wraps theoreticalRtp(buildModel(modelOverrides)) in src/slotmath.js.

modelOverrides.description: Optional partial model overrides merged via buildModel() (e.g. { weights, paytable }). Omit for the default model.

tools.name: simulate_rtp
tools.title: Simulate RTP (seeded Monte-Carlo)
tools.description: Run a seeded Monte-Carlo simulation of the full game and return RTP with a 95% confidence interval, the line/bonus split, hit frequency, and bonus-trigger and grand rates. Deterministic for a given seed. Wraps monteCarloFullGame(buildModel(modelOverrides), { seed, spins }) in src/slotmath.js.

seed.description: RNG seed (mulberry32). The same seed yields an identical result.

spins.description: Number of simulated spins (the local MCP server caps this at 5,000,000).

modelOverrides.description: Optional partial model overrides merged via buildModel().
